citeFormats.name: Bibliography_Link
Cite

exportFormats.name: Bibliography Card
exportFormats.outputPathTemplate: Bibliografía/{{    (creators[0].lastName or creators[0].name or "Anon")  }}-{{    (date | format("YYYY") or "n.d.")  }}-{{    (title | replace(":", " -")           | replace("/", "-")           | replace("\\", "-")           | replace("?", "")           | replace("*", "")           | replace("\"", "'")           | replace("<", "(")           | replace(">", ")")           | replace("|", "-"))  }}-{{    (itemType or "Item") | upper  }}.md

exportFormats.name: Codification Import
exportFormats.outputPathTemplate: Bibliografía/{{    (creators[0].lastName or creators[0].name or "Anon")  }}-{{    (date | format("YYYY") or "n.d.")  }}-{{    (title | replace(":", " -")           | replace("/", "-")           | replace("\\", "-")           | replace("?", "")           | replace("*", "")           | replace("\"", "'")           | replace("<", "(")           | replace(">", ")")           | replace("|", "-"))  }}-{{    (itemType or "Item") | upper  }}-codification.md

exportFormats.name: Research Notes
exportFormats.outputPathTemplate: Bibliografía/{{    (creators[0].lastName or creators[0].name or "Anon")  }}-{{    (date | format("YYYY") or "n.d.")  }}-{{    (title | replace(":", " -")           | replace("/", "-")           | replace("\\", "-")           | replace("?", "")           | replace("*", "")           | replace("\"", "'")           | replace("<", "(")           | replace(">", ")")           | replace("|", "-"))  }}-{{    (itemType or "Item") | upper  }}-annotations.md
